scenarios.name: baseline_create
scenarios.notes: Created a one-node RabbitMQ cluster and measured time to first healthy reconciliation.

scenarios.name: restart_during_scale
scenarios.notes: Scaled from 1 to 2 replicas while deleting the operator pod to force recovery from an interrupted reconcile path.

scenarios.name: quota_blocked_scale
scenarios.notes: Applied a ResourceQuota to intentionally block pod creation during scale-up, then removed it and measured recovery.
